name: Scrimba
description: Scrimba — interactive coding education platform where screencasts are editable, letting learners pause and edit code directly within video lessons.

seo.title: Scrimba — Developer Documentation / DevRel
seo.meta_description: Scrimba: Scrimba — interactive coding education platform where screencasts are editable, letting learners pause and edit code directly within video lessons.

when_to_use: Editable React screencast paused and code modified mid-lesson
JavaScript course consumed where learners type into the video
Frontend mentor challenge linked inside Scrimba learning path
Bootcamp curriculum delivered via interactive Scrimba format
Code walkthrough recorded as Scrimba cast for team knowledge sharing

pros: Editable screencasts are genuinely innovative format
Active community and supportive mentorship culture
Career path bootcamps include real project work
cons: Frontend-heavy catalog, weak on backend topics
Screencast format can slow down advanced learners
Subscription required for most quality content
Limited offline viewing and download options
review.verdict: Uniquely interactive frontend learning; skip if you want backend breadth or fast-forward-through tutorials.
review.best_for: Frontend learners who benefit from pausing, editing, and experimenting inside video lessons.
review.not_for: Backend-focused learners or senior devs who prefer reference docs and fast playback.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with free tier; no peak-lock evidence
